name: gate-search-on-storage-hydration
title: Gate Search on Storage Hydration
description: Expose explicit storage readiness and fail closed for onboarding-sensitive CoreBox and indexing startup.
scope: Storage readiness state, onboarding gate, CoreBox shortcut behavior, and consent-sensitive search/indexing startup
creator: TalexDreamSoul
notes: Explicit storage readiness and shared onboarding admission are implemented. Search providers/indexing maintenance, SearchCore, and CoreBox now fail closed until allowed; no schema or real-profile data changed.

meta.nextAction: Archive after the recorded focused checks and state-machine smoke remain green.
meta.evidence: 8 focused files / 37 tests passed; scoped ESLint and CoreApp node typecheck passed; direct state-machine smoke covered single-flight pending, blocked, allowed, recoverable degraded/retry, terminal degraded, and duplicate decision suppression.
